item.title: Version 2.4.3
item.description:
ForgedBrew 2.4.3

Mac Store / Other Apps updates are now awareness-only. In-place updating (via topgrade) was silently failing — it could report success without the app actually updating — so ForgedBrew now shows available updates via MAS and you update each Mac/Other app from its own updater, or Mac App Store apps in the App Store. Deeper topgrade integration is planned for a future release. Also in this release: the Homebrew Updates buttons (Update / Update Selected / Update All) now share a consistent, calmer Homebrew-amber colorway; the Maintenance screen's brew-doctor Diagnostics is tidied up — it sits beside the health ring to reduce scrolling, and findings render as clean cards; and an internal automated test suite was added covering the update-detection, security, and version-comparison logic.

item.title: Version 2.4.2
item.description:
ForgedBrew 2.4.2

Security Scan now audits every installed app — Homebrew casks plus everything in /Applications, ~/Applications, and your custom folders — not just casks. Plus a fix for a bogus 'Installed Dec 31, 1903' date after in-app updates, and clearer quarantine-sheet wording.

item.title: Version 2.4.1
item.description:
ForgedBrew 2.4.1

Enhanced Trust Management and Homebrew security scanning ahead of Homebrew's September 1, 2026 cask-quarantine change: faster and more accurate scans (no false alarms on large apps, online notarization recognized, saved results with Re-scan, and CVSS severity ratings). Plus other cleanup and refinement: reliable installs from every screen, Cmd-Q quits, more accurate update detection, better search, and a documentation and QA hardening pass.

item.title: Version 2.4.0
item.description:
ForgedBrew 2.4.0

Further clean up and refinement, bug fixes and improvements.
